OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: ClinicianOffBoarding

childElements.name: ExtractHpfRecords
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "ContactId" : "=%getContactId:Account:PersonContactId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DMTGetRelatedHPFRecords", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperTurboAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: getContactId
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "ContextId" : "=%ContextId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { "" : "" }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DMEGetAccountContactId", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperTurboAction3", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Load_OffboardingCases
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "recordTypeId" : "%SV_OffboardingcseRecordTypeId:caseRecordTypeId%", "OffboardingCases" : "%OffboardingCases%", "ContactId" : "%ContactId%", "AccountId" : "%AccountId%", "caseStatus" : "Not Started", "caseType" : "Facility" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DRPCreateOffboardingCases", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: SV_OffboardingcseRecordTypeId
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "elementValueMap" : { "caseRecordTypeId" : "=QUERY(\"select Id from RecordType where DeveloperName = '{0}' and SobjectType = '{1}'\",'Clinician_Offboarding','Case')" }, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "SetValues2", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DRT_SelectedHpfs
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "HpfList" : "=LIST(%HpfList%)" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DRTTransformSelectedHPFRecords", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperTransformAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

OmniIntegrationProcedure.propertySetConfig: { "linkToExternalObject" : "", "trackingCustomData" : { }, "includeAllActionsInResponse" : false, "columnsPropertyMap" : [ ], "relationshipFieldsMap" : [ ], "labelSingular" : "", "labelPlural" : "", "description" : "", "nameColumn" : "", "rollbackOnError" : false, "chainableQueriesLimit" : 50, "chainableDMLStatementsLimit" : null, "chainableCpuLimit" : 2000, "chainableHeapSizeLimit" : null, "chainableDMLRowsLimit" : null, "chainableQueryRowsLimit" : null, "chainableSoslQueriesLimit" : null, "chainableActualTimeLimit" : null, "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "queueableChainableQueriesLimit" : 120, "queueableChainableCpuLimit" : 40000, "queueableChainableHeapSizeLimit" : 6, "ttlMinutes" : 5, "mockResponseMap" : { } }
